title: Stone Polish
description: Adds Huge Building Variety from Consistency to new Blocks!
body:
# **⭐ Stone Polish — Vanilla-Friendly Stone Expansion**

**Stone Polish** adds new polished, brick, cracked, chiseled, pillar, stair, slab, and wall variants for many existing stone-based blocks — all crafted or stone-cutted in a perfectly vanilla-friendly style.

📹 Showcase (5.0): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/GIWHtVfyzNc](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/GIWHtVfyzNc)    
📹 Old Showcase (2.0): https://www.youtube.com/shorts/VSMK3hYppO8


💬 Problems? Suggestions? – Join the **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XRuZTuFFHR)**

## 🌍 Languages
- English (en_us)
- German (de_de)
- Spanish (es_es)
- French (fr_fr)
- Russian (ru_ru)
## 🪨 What It Adds
### **As of 5.0**

Each “Set” includes raw, polished, brick, cracked, pillar, chiseled, stairs, slabs, and walls variants.

- Calcite Set
- Netherrack Set
- Stone Set
- Andesite Set
- Diorite Set
- Granite Set
- Quartz Set
- Deepslate Set
- Purpur Set
- End Stone Set
- Mud Set
- Dripstone Set
- Basalt Set
- Prismarine Set
- Dark Prismarine Set
- Shale Set

## Credits:

Shale side Texture was made by @Ozymoronic in his Discord Server -> [Team 'bodacious](https://discord.gg/MGH2kfqYXW) 

and by @Alex- Artist (co-owner) helped with shale too in this Discord Server -> [Team Deep](https://discord.gg/BVNerFrzNK)
